title: Wander: a decentralized console for the small web
author: Ellsworth Toohey
summary: A new project called Wander lets you drop two files onto your personal website — an index.html and a wander.js — and turn it into a node in a decentralized web console. Visitors click a button and are sent to a random page on your site, then to a site you've linked to, then to a site that one links to, going one hop deeper into the network with each click. — Read the rest
